center.name: Portsoy
center.summary: Portsoy是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括European rock pipit，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: petrosus at Portsoy in Aberdeenshire, Scotland | image2 = Rock Pipit (Anthus petrosus) (W1CDR0001427 BD6).ogg | image2_caption = Bird recorded in Pembrokeshire, Wales | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Anthus | species = petrosus | authority = (Montagu, 1798) | synonyms = Anthus spinoletta petrosus (Montagu, 1798) | range_map = Anthus petrosus map.png | range_map_caption = }} The European rock pipit (Anthus petrosus), or simply rock pipit, is a species of small passerine bird that breeds in western Europe on rocky coasts
